evidence.snippet: HZO - Parylene & Thin Film Coating Company Homepage

items.notes: Parylene and thin-film polymer coatings applied to electronic components in drones and other industries.

products_categories.notes: HZO applies protective polymer (Parylene and thin-film) coatings to PCBs and electronic components. Parylene qualifies as a polymer material under structures_and_materials, though HZO delivers it as a contract coating service rather than raw material supply. No UXV-specific product line exists; drone/UAV electronics protection is one application among many.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: HZO is a multi-market protective thin-film coating services company (medical, consumer electronics, IoT, industrial, automotive, aerospace/defense). UAV coatings are listed as one application under Aerospace & Defense alongside six other major markets. No UXV-specific product line.

tagline: Parylene and nanocoating service provider (Guardian series products and turnkey CVD application) for conformal protection of electronics in harsh environments. ITAR-registered, ISO 9001 certified, production-ready at four global locations. No public evidence of NDAA compliance or Blue UAS certification. Sarcos Robotics and Prismview among named customers, but defense/UAS application details remain sparse in public record.
